programmes.show_description: Bert takes refuge in Alf's home after a domestic dispute. S6 E3: Marital Bliss
With Boomtown Rats. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy extravaganza from Thames TV (1980). All in the best possible taste!
While Simon is at Waterloo station making a phone call, a man is killed in unusual circumstances and leads to a mysterious plot involving tea and military bases. S3 E1: The Miracle Tea Party

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
Nothing before or since has equalled the splendour and magnificence of Tutankhamun but is there a darker secret held within. Narrated by Robert Powell.
This unique series narrated by Sir Tony Robinson uses home movie archive footage to reveal life in 20th-century Britain as never seen before - this episode features footage from the 1950s. S1 E3
American pilots fought the enemy in the skies during the Vietnam War, but were these enemy pilots North Vietnamese or from another communist country? S2 E8: Vietnam Alpha Strike
The Yakovlev Yak-1 was a Soviet fighter aircraft of World War II - it was a single-seat monoplane with a composite structure and wooden wings and was a fast and competitive fighter aircraft. S3 E4
The series begins before the First World War when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. Ep1: Useless For The Purposes Of War
The Norwegian resistance movement was one of the most effective movements in the whole of occupied Europe; its activities helped destroy Germany's warships. Ep8: The Norwegian Resistance Fighters
We tell the story of the crucial battles for control of the Mediterranean, North Africa, and the irreplaceable oil fields in World War 2 and the story of the war in Greece.
The story of RJ Mitchell and his team who developed the Spitfire just in time to defeat the Nazi attacks during the Battle of Britain. Ep2: The Man Who Designed The Spitfire
Rockets had a huge impact on World War II - hand-held rocket launchers such as the American bazooka and German panzerfaust enabled infantry to tackle tanks head-on. Ep8: Rockets
As the incredible stories of those at sea are heard, relentless attacks by U-boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat the Nazi empire. Ep3: U-Boat Terror
New tactics are born in every war; long battles rage throughout WWII, from Guadalcanal in the Pacific to the brutal siege at Leningrad. Ep5: The Guadalcanal Campaign, 1942
This episode focuses on the tools of espionage employed by both the Allies and the Axis during WW2. E4: Weapons of the Shadow War
Sarah announces to James that she is pregnant with his baby, but this on top of his gambling debts is the final straw for the family - can they avoid a major scandal? S2 E2: A Pair of Exiles
A video implicating two senior police officers in the Serious Crime division is mistakenly returned to Daley Videos, and Arthur and Terry get involved. S7 E4: The Last Video Show
When Dempsey is accused of murdering a small-time criminal, Makepeace puts her career on the line as she tries to prove his innocence. S3 E2: Jericho Scam
The team is on the hunt for major vehicle thief Jed Wicklow; when a car chase leads to his death, Gene stands accused of causing it through reckless driving. S2 E2
Alf, the Reads and the Rawlins get involved in an argument about their elected representatives. S6 E4: Wedgie Ben
With Suzi Quatro and Joe Jackson. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy extravaganza from Thames TV (1980). All in the best possible taste!
While catching up on some downtime in the Bahamas, Simon becomes involved in the death of his friend's sister after she is the target of a blackmail plot. S3 E2: Lida

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
After WWII, Britain rushed the Comet jetliner into service. Mysterious crashes led to tests that reshaped aircraft design forever. Narrated by Robert Powell.
This unique series narrated by Sir Tony Robinson uses home movie archive footage to reveal life in 20th-century Britain as never seen before - this episode features footage from the 1960s. S1 E4
The American army was struggling to engage an elusive enemy; learn about the Viet Cong's secret methods to hinder America's attempts to seal off South Vietnam. S2 E9: Vietnam - Hidden in Plain Sight
The F-4 Phantom II is an American tandem two-seat, twin-engine, long-range supersonic jet interceptor and fighter-bomber originally developed by McDonnell Aircraft for the United States Navy. S3 E5
The 1920s and 1930s were uncertain times for the RAF and all other armed services; with peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development. Ep2: Under Distant Skies
When American forces began the reconquest of the Philippine islands in 1944, they faced a terrifying weapon - the Kamikaze suicide attack. Ep9: The Kamikazes
The campaign in Tunisia in World War Two saw the battles that finally ended the brutal war in the desert. We look at the weapons used and tactics and tell the story of the battle itself.
The story of Colonel Count Claus von Stauffenberg and the other German officers who tried to kill Adolf Hitler in a bomb plot of July 1944. Ep3: The Man Who Stood Up To Hitler
The machine gun did not dominate the battlefield of WWII - unlike WWI - but it remained a highly potent weapon including being incorporated into the wings of fighter planes. Ep9: The Machine Gun
We experience the event that changed the war's course and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces. Ep4: Pearl Harbor
A world war is a patchwork of actions, land, sea and air; Japan gathers naval strength for an attack on Midway Island as they attempt to lure the United States into a trap. Ep6: Fragmentation
Priceless art, personal assets and national treasures were an extraordinary amount of loot prized by Hitler as much as territory - we discover the organised plunder of these riches. S1 E5: Nazi Gold
The Kirbridge marriage is in trouble as Elizabeth is feeling unwanted by Lawrence and he refuses to discuss her want to start a family - does the poet have other interests? S2 E3: Married Love
Arthur puts his savings into an old safe in the lock-up, but his nest egg is put in danger when an old acquaintance arrives from Marbella. S7 E5: Fiddler on the Hoof
Dempsey and Makepeace find themselves in grave danger when an injured bare-knuckle boxer sparks off an investigation into counterfeiters. S3 E3: The Prizefighter
When animal rights activists threaten a series of attacks in London and place the daughter of a laboratory owner in hospital, Gene is determined to track them down. S2 E3
